channel.title: Master Candidates on NTU IoT Sensing Group

item.title: Yimin Dai
item.description: Yimin Dai Position: Master Student Contact: yimin004@e.ntu.edu.sg Bio: I am currently a M.ENG student in school of computer science and engineering, Nanyang Technological University, Singapore. I obtained my bachelor degree in computing in The Hong Kong Polytechnic University in 2021. My research interest lies in novel applications in sensing systems and utilizing edge AI algorithm in boosting the performance of sensing systems.
